# Copilot Instructions

When making changes in this repository, follow `docs/repo-change-checklist.md`.

Always check whether the change requires updates to:

- `README.md`
- `docs/index.md`
- `docs/index.html`
- `tools/index.html`
- `tools/README.md`
- `docs/governance/power-bi-governance-tools.md`
- `TODO.md`
- sparse clone scripts under `shared/scripts/`

Validate browser tools and PowerShell scripts before marking work complete.
